products.name: ASC-II Composite Propellers for Piston Engine Aircraft
products.descriptor: Second-generation Advanced Structural Composite constant-speed propeller family for piston aircraft up to 350 hp

evidence.snippet: With over 30 years of experience in the design and manufacturing of structural composite blades, Hartzell introduced the second generation Advance Structural Composite (ASC-II) blade in 2006. Several certified OEM airframe manufacturers have selected the ASC-II blade as standard equipment because of the low weight, low inertia, and low life cycle costs that it offers their customers.

products.name: ASC-II Composite Propellers for Turboprop Engine Aircraft
products.descriptor: Second-generation Advanced Structural Composite propeller family for turboprop aircraft, certified up to 1,700 SHP

evidence.snippet: In 2006, Hartzell introduced the second generation Advance Structural Composite propeller blade (ASC-II). The Hartzell ASC-II is a propeller that delivers all of the advantages provided by Hartzell’s first generation of composite propellers – low weight, low inertia, and low life cycle costs – while minimizing the historical disadvantage: the high-cost manufacturing process.

products.name: Raptor Series Propeller
products.descriptor: Aluminum-hub carbon fiber scimitar constant-speed propeller series for experimental kitplane aircraft

evidence.snippet: The pre-flight inspection of the new Hartzell Raptor Series propellers is slightly different from other Hartzell models. To verify if you have a Raptor Series propeller, look for with the model number 3C-919A1 and the blades numbers 76C03-2. Here are a few tips to follow when conducting a pre-flight inspection of your Raptor series propeller.
74 inch diameter 3-bladed, aluminum “Raptor™” hub and Carbon Fiber Scimitar blades

products.name: Propeller De-Ice / Ice Protection Systems
products.descriptor: FAA-PMA-approved electrothermal de-icer boot kits and ice protection components for aircraft propellers

evidence.snippet: NEW:  Hartzell Service Letter HC-SL-30-308 introduces Hartzell Propeller Inc.  FAA-PMA approval for propeller mounted ice protection system components.   View the service letter [here](https://hartzellprop.com/wp-content/uploads/SL308-R00-C.pdf).

Hartzell de-ice components have been designed, extensively tested and FAA-certified, and feature superior warranty coverage. The de-icer boots are covered for 18-month/2000 flight hours. Other components of the de-ice kits feature a 12-month/1000 flight hour warranty. This warranty also covers labor to remove and replace defective parts.

products.name: Top Prop STC Propellers (Scimitar Aluminum Series)
products.descriptor: STC-approved scimitar aluminum constant-speed propeller upgrade kits for certified piston aircraft

evidence.snippet:
Top Prop Conversion Program
---------------------------
A propeller conversion is one of the smartest investments you can make for your aircraft. Hartzell Propeller Top Prop Conversions allow you to upgrade to our innovative new designs featuring scimitar blades, blended airfoils, and rugged structural composite materials.
### Find Your Aircraft
[SEARCH BY MANUFACTURER, MODEL, and SERIES](/products/top-prop/#top-prop-search)

**Specifications:**
80 inch dia 3-bladed, scimitar, aluminum hub prop
2400 hour / 6 year TBO
82 pounds (propeller and spinner)
Diameter reduction allowable to 78 inches
